user.title: Create a space
user.description: A space wraps an area with presence tracking, an occupancy lifecycle, and experience states. Picking an area builds the room profile automatically; everything can be tuned later via Configure — start with 'Add common states'.

data_description.presence_entities: Motion, occupancy, mmWave, zone, person, or count entities that mean someone is in this space. Numeric states above zero count as presence. Leave empty to auto-fill from the chosen area.
data_description.presence_match: Comma-separated extra states that count as presence — e.g. this room's name for BLE room trackers (Bermuda, ESPresense).
data_description.wake_duration: Seconds presence must persist before the space counts as fully occupied.
data_description.clear_delay: Seconds after presence clears (while occupied) before the space starts cooling down.
data_description.pass_through_delay: Seconds after presence clears (while waking) before it counts as passing through.
data_description.cooldown_duration: Seconds spent winding down before the space is vacant. Set to 0 to skip.

error.presence_required: Pick presence entities, or choose an area so they can be auto-filled.

abort.already_configured: A space with this name already exists.

menu_options.fill_from_area: Fill the room profile from the area
menu_options.add_ambiance: Add a shared-ambiance rule (react to another space)

add_ambiance.title: Shared-ambiance rule
add_ambiance.description: While the watched entity matches, this space's lighting is reshaped — perfect for open floor plans: cap the kitchen while the living-room movie runs, keep a faint glow instead of full dark.

data_description.entity_id: Usually a neighbor space's Experience select — but any entity works (a bedtime toggle, an alarm state).
data_description.states: Comma-separated states that activate the rule, matched case-insensitively (e.g. media).
data_description.brightness_cap: No light in this space exceeds this while the rule matches.
data_description.vacant_brightness: Instead of turning everything off when vacant, keep the night (or ambient) lights glowing at this level.
data_description.wake_brightness: Overrides the gentle wake level while the rule matches.

menu_options.discover_control: Add a control by pressing it

add_starter_states.title: Add common states
add_starter_states.description: Pre-tuned states for how rooms actually get used. Everything they set can be edited afterwards.

data_description.media_entity: Playing on this player switches the room to Media and holds it occupied through quiet stretches.
data_description.work_entity: Anything that means work is happening: a desk seat sensor, desk lamp switch, computer power plug.

data_description.presence_entities: Motion, occupancy, mmWave, zone, person, or count entities that mean someone is in this space. Numeric states above zero count as presence.
data_description.presence_match: Comma-separated extra states that count as presence — e.g. this room's name for BLE room trackers (Bermuda, ESPresense).
data_description.wake_duration: Seconds presence must persist before the space counts as fully occupied.
data_description.clear_delay: Seconds after presence clears (while occupied) before the space starts cooling down.
data_description.pass_through_delay: Seconds after presence clears (while waking) before it counts as passing through.
data_description.cooldown_duration: Seconds spent winding down before the space is vacant. Set to 0 to skip.

profile.title: Room profile
profile.description: Assign what lives in this space. Roles let the engine light, heat, and read the room intelligently.

data_description.lights_night: Used for gentle wake acknowledgement; falls back to ambient at low brightness.
data_description.lux_threshold: Lights only turn on automatically when the room is darker than this.
data_description.target_lux: Keep the room at this measured level: brightness is estimated from the deficit at turn-on, then nudged as the sensor changes (deadband and rate-limited). 0 disables; circadian then drives brightness.

data_description.auto_lighting: Built-in wake, occupied, cool-down, and off lighting for the profile lights. Explicit phase/state actions always take precedence.
data_description.circadian_enabled: Drift color temperature and brightness with the sun while the space is occupied.
data_description.manual_hold: How long a manual takeover lasts before automation resumes. 0 keeps manual control until the space is vacant.

data_description.vacant_climate: Climate intent applied when the space empties. Keep means never touch the thermostat.
data_description.window_pause_delay: Seconds a window must stay open before climate pauses; it restores when all windows close.

phase_actions.title: Phase actions
phase_actions.description: Actions that run when the space wakes (gentle acknowledgement), starts cooling down, goes vacant, or was only passed through. Use conditions inside the actions for time-of-day variants.

data_description.pass_through_actions: Runs instead of the vacant actions when someone only passed through. Leave empty to use the vacant actions.

add_state.title: Add an experience state
add_state.description: Only a name is required — expand the sections below for matching, comfort, and actions.

data_description.priority: When several states match, the highest priority wins.

evidence.name: Evidence & matching
evidence.description: What tells the space this experience is happening.

data.hold_occupancy: Hold occupancy while evidence is active

data_description.evidence_entities: Entities whose state indicates this experience. Leave empty to make this the baseline state.
data_description.active_states: Comma-separated entity states that count as active evidence.
data_description.hold_occupancy: Keep the space occupied while this state's evidence is active, even if motion stops — perfect for movie night.
data_description.dayparts: Only match during these dayparts. Empty means always.

comfort.name: Lighting & climate
comfort.description: What the space does while this experience is active.

data_description.light_roles: Which profile lights this state turns on. Empty leaves lighting to enter actions or the built-in baseline.
data_description.light_brightness: Fixed brightness for this state. Empty follows the circadian curve.
data_description.climate_intent: Comfort intent applied when this state becomes active.

data_description.enter_actions: Runs when the space enters this state.
data_description.exit_actions: Runs when the space leaves this state.

edit_state_form.title: Edit an experience state
edit_state_form.description: Only a name is required — expand the sections below for matching, comfort, and actions.

data_description.priority: When several states match, the highest priority wins.

evidence.name: Evidence & matching
evidence.description: What tells the space this experience is happening.

data.hold_occupancy: Hold occupancy while evidence is active

data_description.evidence_entities: Entities whose state indicates this experience. Leave empty to make this the baseline state.
data_description.active_states: Comma-separated entity states that count as active evidence.
data_description.hold_occupancy: Keep the space occupied while this state's evidence is active, even if motion stops — perfect for movie night.
data_description.dayparts: Only match during these dayparts. Empty means always.

comfort.name: Lighting & climate
comfort.description: What the space does while this experience is active.

data_description.light_roles: Which profile lights this state turns on. Empty leaves lighting to enter actions or the built-in baseline.
data_description.light_brightness: Fixed brightness for this state. Empty follows the circadian curve.
data_description.climate_intent: Comfort intent applied when this state becomes active.

data_description.enter_actions: Runs when the space enters this state.
data_description.exit_actions: Runs when the space leaves this state.

add_control.title: Add a control
add_control.description: Bind a physical button, switch, remote, or any entity to a space command — like Switch Manager, but space-aware.

data_description.entity_id: Event entities (modern button remotes), switches, buttons, or sensors.
data_description.trigger: For event entities: the event type (single, double, long, ...). For other entities: the state that triggers. Use "any" to match everything.
data_description.state_id: Required for the Set state command.
data_description.dayparts: The control only fires during these dayparts. Bind the same button twice with different dayparts to do different things at different times.
data_description.actions: Used by the Run custom actions command.

data_description.entity_id: Event entities (modern button remotes), switches, buttons, or sensors.
data_description.trigger: For event entities: the event type (single, double, long, ...). For other entities: the state that triggers. Use "any" to match everything.
data_description.state_id: Required for the Set state command.
data_description.dayparts: The control only fires during these dayparts. Bind the same button twice with different dayparts to do different things at different times.
data_description.actions: Used by the Run custom actions command.

discover_control_form.title: Control detected
discover_control_form.description:
Captured: `{captured}`

Pick what this press should do.

data_description.trigger: The captured press type. Use "any" to react to every press of this control.
data_description.state_id: Required for the Set state command.
data_description.dayparts: The control only fires during these dayparts. Bind the same button twice with different dayparts to do different things at different times.
data_description.actions: Used by the Run custom actions command.

progress.press_control: Press the button or control you want to bind now — the first press detected will be mapped.

error.state_required: Pick an experience state for the Set state command.
error.no_templates: Pick at least one state to add (states already in this space are skipped).
error.media_entity_required: The Media state needs a media player.
error.work_entity_required: The Working state needs a work evidence entity.

abort.no_press_detected: No press was detected within 30 seconds. Open the menu and try again.
abort.no_area: This space has no area assigned. Set one under Presence & timing first.

options.media: Media — movie lighting, holds occupancy while playing
options.working: Working — full task lighting while work evidence is active

set_state.name: Set experience state
set_state.description: Pins a space to an experience state (waking it if vacant) until cleared or the space goes vacant.

state.name: State
state.description: Name or ID of the experience state.

clear_override.name: Clear override
clear_override.description: Returns a space to automatic experience selection.
